artifact: Completion percentage is completed Japanese-driver results divided by all Japanese-driver results from 2007 through 2009.
sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN res.time IS NOT NULL AND res.time <> '' THEN res.driverId END) * 100.0 / COUNT(res.driverId) AS completion_percentage FROM results res JOIN races r ON r.raceId = res.raceId JOIN drivers d ON d.driverId = res.driverId WHERE d.nationality = 'Japanese' AND r.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

raw_response.sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN res.time IS NOT NULL AND res.time <> '' THEN res.driverId END) * 100.0 / COUNT(res.driverId) AS completion_percentage FROM results res JOIN races r ON r.raceId = res.raceId JOIN drivers d ON d.driverId = res.driverId WHERE d.nationality = 'Japanese' AND r.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;
raw_response.artifact: Completion percentage is completed Japanese-driver results divided by all Japanese-driver results from 2007 through 2009.
